free_text: from photo-fission of natPb induced by 2.5 GeV
Preliminary mass yield in fig, same <A> in table
Pulsed electron beam on thin tungsten target
Natural Pb metal foil (12.417 g, 0.5 mm thickness,
25 cm2 area, 99.999% purity) wrapped with Al foil
To count gamma-ray of fission and reaction
products, detector efficiency of 20% with an energy
resolution of 1.8 keV FWHM at 1332.5 keV peak of 60Co
No information on source of uncertainties
